steps.title: Write the ratio as a proportion
steps.content:
The ratio of $t$ to $u$ is $2$ to $3$, so use $t=18$ in the proportion.
$$\frac{18}{u}=\frac{2}{3}$$

steps.title: Solve for the missing value
steps.content:
Cross-multiply and divide by $2$.
$$18\cdot 3=2u$$
$$54=2u$$
$$u=27$$
The answer is D.
